seo_title: How Google's Lyria 3 Pro Enables Longer Tracks in More Tools
meta_description: Discover how Lyria 3 Pro enhances structural awareness and unlocks longer tracks in more Google products and surfaces.
body_html:
Lyria 3 Pro enables longer tracks with structural awareness, unlocking new possibilities in Google tools.

What is Lyria 3 Pro?Unlocks longer tracks with structural awarenessBrings Lyria to more Google products and surfacesBenefits for ProfessionalsFeatureDescriptionStructural AwarenessEnhances track creation with AI-driven insightsIncreased ProductivityAutomates tasks, reducing manual effortAvailability and IntegrationLyria 3 Pro is now available in more Google tools, making it easier for professionals to work efficiently.

source.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more
source.summary: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.
